title: 2D Magnetic Semiconductor Fe<sub>3</sub>GeTe<sub>2</sub> with Few and Single Layers with a Greatly Enhanced Intrinsic Exchange Bias by Liquid-Phase Exfoliation
type1_summary: No figure-ready cleaned dataset files were identified.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The paper analysis found no data availability statement, no downloadable data files, and no repository/source-data links on the publisher page.
file_classifications.file_evidence: This is a PDF main article file from Zenodo, size 974.8 KB. As provided, it is the publication itself rather than a data table or instrument dataset. No internal file structure indicating tabular figure data is available from the inspection report.
file_classifications.reasoning: The file is the paper PDF, not a dataset file. It does not meet Type 1 or Type 2 criteria because it is documentation rather than data. Since the paper does not indicate accompanying source/raw data and the file is the article itself, the conservative classification is documentation.

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports scalable liquid-phase exfoliation of few- and single-layer Fe3GeTe2 nanoflakes and their enhanced intrinsic exchange bias and semiconducting behavior for 2D spintronic applications.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: No explicit dataset or source data is available from the provided information; the paper appears to have no accessible data files identified on the publisher site.
